channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Manhole cover not fixed properly, 2nd July
item.description:
Manhole cover in Upland Road, behind garden fence of 20 Belvedere Road, not fixed properly into tarmac and clicks loudly whenever a vehicle passes over it. This can be heard from inside nearby properties and is quite disturbing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Upland Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of litter and bottles cans etc on grass verge main road near banister gardens, 2nd July
item.description:
Lots of litter and bottles , cans etc. on grass verge Near banister gardens.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Main Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath litter, bottles, cans general rubbish. Dumped chair, 2nd July
item.description:
Hasn’t been cleaned for ages. Been reported . Not fixed. Dumped chair now. Really bad.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Brantwood Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath litter, bottles, cans general rubbish. Dumped chair, 2nd July
item.description:
Hasn’t been cleaned for ages. Been reported . Not fixed. Dumped chair now. Really bad.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Brantwood Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street Light B35/16 on Bromley Road Chislehurst, BR7 at the junction with Prince Imperial Road is not working, 2nd July
item.description:
Street Light B35/16 on Bromley Road Chislehurst, BR7 at the junction with Prince Imperial Road is not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car staying for long period, 2nd July
item.description:
A suspicious car parked, a black 2007 Honda FR-V, bearing the registration plate **LD07 ZCE**. It appears to have been abandoned in the car park for a unusual amount of time, clearly evidenced by a thick layer of dust.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hoxton Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of grass seed required, 2nd July
item.description:
Please can extra grass seed be put down on the lawn as we have many many grass free areas that need attention. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ambulance called to underage drunk teenagers, 1st July
item.description:
At 5.45 today an ambulance had to be called to an extremely drunk teenage girl. She was about 14, with another couple of very drunk teenagers. Ongoing issues with teenagers causing ASB in and near to The Ice House.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More litter in The Ice House, 1st July
item.description:
Please can all this litter be cleaned up and taken away. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing communal bin, 1st July
item.description:
Could you please empty the overflowing bin ASAP?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gloucester Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Not moved for a couple of months., 1st July
item.description:
This Van has been parked on double yellow lines for weeks. It is not locked. I think it is the same van that was previously parked in Kings Highway. It must have been in the UK and not registered over six months by now. It is blocking the line of site when exiting Woodbrook Road into Waterdale Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterdale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 1st July
item.description:
Council hasn't cleared bins as road was blocked and now everyone us flytipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Institute Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fountain house and next to small bungalow, 1st July
item.description:
Estate gardener came out 2 weeks ago cut the grass next to Kingston house the stop and cut the grass and over grown bushes at my next door neighbour bungalow the Avenue then went in to there garden and cut and mow there garden instead.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost outside 58 Stanhope St, 1st July
item.description:
This street lamp is not turning on at night thus this portion of the street is very dark now. Please could this be fixed. This seems to only have been a problem recently.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-18, Stanhope Street, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned trolleys with rubbish in, 1st July
item.description:
There have been several trolleys with rubbish in just left in the road and on the pavement for weeks. This area has always got things dumped. Could there be a camera up to deter and catch whoever is doing it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Playgreen Way, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tipper truck dumped with rubbish on back, 1st July
item.description:
There is a tipper truck with flat tyres and rubbish piled in the back of it. The rubbish pile on the back is getting bigger. There is also fly tipping around the van.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swallands Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling bin tipped over into road, 1st July
item.description:
Someone’s recycling bin has been tipped over and all the rubbish strewn in the road. The bin is hanging in the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookehowse Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds growing in curbs and on pavements, 1st July
item.description:
The whole of Bellingham has weeds growing in the curbs and along the boundaries of people’s gardens - unfortunately it seems people no longer take pride in the area so are not looking after outside of their houses. The weeds are so high and look so unsightly. These are just 2 photos I’ve taken but this is similar around the estate and on Southend lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Overdown Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on path near infant school, 1st July
item.description:
Massive cardboard boxes and washing machine dumped on pavement. Addressee removed labels but missed one. See photos.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 86-92, McNeil Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped fridge/freezer, damaged and stripped for parts, 1st July
item.description:
Fly tipped fridge/freezer outside residential block. It has been smashed/stripped for parts and left behind. Concern about sharp metal, exposed wires, possible oil/refrigerant residue and hazardous electrical waste. It was not there earlier this evening.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hogan Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
